channel.title: Portapps
channel.description: Collection of portable apps for Windows

item.title: Waterfox portable 6.5.1-30
item.description:
Release of Waterfox portable 6.5.1-30 is now available.
You can find links to download this release on the Waterfox portable page.

item.title: Signal portable 7.32.0-8
item.description:
Release of Signal portable 7.32.0-8 is now available.
You can find links to download this release on the Signal portable page.

item.title: Phyrox portable 132.0.1-67
item.description:
Release of Phyrox portable 132.0.1-67 is now available.
You can find links to download this release on the Phyrox portable page.

item.title: Phyrox ESR portable 128.4.0-64
item.description:
Release of Phyrox ESR portable 128.4.0-64 is now available.
You can find links to download this release on the Phyrox ESR portable page.

item.title: Phyrox Developer Edition portable 133.0b7-51
item.description:
Release of Phyrox Developer Edition portable 133.0b7-51 is now available.
You can find links to download this release on the Phyrox Developer Edition portable page.

item.title: Cryptomator portable 1.14.0-14
item.description:
Release of Cryptomator portable 1.14.0-14 is now available.
You can find links to download this release on the Cryptomator portable page.

item.title: Portapps 3.15.0
item.description:
• Add resource hacker lib (#381)
  • Add gn-asar-hash script (#382)

item.title: DBeaver portable 24.2.4-49
item.description:
Release of DBeaver portable 24.2.4-49 is now available.
You can find links to download this release on the DBeaver portable page.

item.title: Caprine portable 2.60.1-40
item.description:
Release of Caprine portable 2.60.1-40 is now available.
You can find links to download this release on the Caprine portable page.

item.title: Franz portable abandoned
item.description:
Franz portable is not maintained anymore as the main project has not released anything for over a year (since Sep 3, 2023).
Downloads are still available on Franz portable page.

item.title: WhatsApp portable abandoned
item.description:
WhatsApp portable is not maintained anymore and is abandoned as the offline installer support has been dropped in favor of installation via Microsoft Store.
Downloads are still available on WhatsApp portable page.

item.title: Ungoogled Chromium portable 130.0.6723.12-19
item.description:
Release of Ungoogled Chromium portable 130.0.6723.12-19 is now available.
You can find links to download this release on the Ungoogled Chromium portable page.

item.title: SmartGit portable 24.1.0-39

item.title: Portapps 3.14.1
item.description: • Rollback to innosetup 6.2.2 (#380)

item.title: Portapps 3.14.0
item.description:
• Update tools (#379)
    • asar 3.2.17
    • innosetup 6.3.3
    • lessmsi 1.11.3
    • rcedit 2.0.0
    • upx 4.2.4
